description: Integrate Isaacus legal NLP ecosystem: Open Australian Legal Corpus, MLEB benchmark extension, Kanon 2 retrieval evaluation, semchunk, Blackstone Graph, and Legal RAG Bench.
oracle_notes: Repo-side Isaacus manifests, AU legal row normalization, PipelineRecord conversion, deterministic local NZ-MLEB fixture with schema validation, fail-closed external access gates, audit-only scripts, documentation, and focused tests are implemented. Live Hugging Face downloads, Kanon API or air-gapped evaluation, AU-to-NZ fine-tuning, measured NZ-MLEB baselines, semchunk comparison, and Blackstone Graph integration remain external gates.
